meaning: n.远足,短途旅游vi.远足,短途旅游
examples: The picture was taken on their first jaunt before their children were born.
Mr Zardari's jaunt to Europe looks to some like the final insult for the deluged nation.
Holidaying in Morocco this month after a North American jaunt, Abdullah shows no particular sign of frailty.
Barring a rash move on either side, Mr Ahmadinejad's jaunt will probably not change very much.
He wanted to take his wife, four children and four dogs on a jaunt.
